description_long: This is a tracked military vehicle with a large, elevated missile launcher system mounted on its rear. The vehicle is painted in a dark olive drab color and features prominent white star insignias on the launcher and body, indicating military use. The front of the vehicle has a slatted grille, headlights, and visible markings such as 'U.S. ARMY.' The sides reveal a robust track system for off-road mobility and a boxy, armored cab with hatches and equipment storage. The missile launcher is rectangular, angled upward, and appears to be capable of housing multiple rockets or missiles. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and mobility for tactical operations in urban or battlefield environments.
description: A tracked, armored military vehicle with an elevated missile launcher and prominent white star insignias, painted in dark olive drab. Features include a slatted grille, robust tracks, and a large, angled launcher system.
description_view_0: Front view showing the slatted grille, headlights, 'U.S. ARMY' markings, and the raised missile launcher above the cab.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full track system, armored cab, and the large, angled missile launcher with a visible star insignia.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the missile launcher, its rectangular shape, and the rear of the vehicle's chassis.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the track system, side hatches, and the missile launcher with another visible star insignia.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large missile launcher mounted on the rear upper section of the vehicle; no other weapon mounts visible.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating covering the cab and chassis, with thick, flat panels and some sloped surfaces for deflection; no modular or reactive panels visible.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark olive drab color with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: White star emblems on the launcher sides and vehicle body; 'U.S. ARMY' and a yellow number plate on the front grille.
